text.title: Video Gen Basics — Provider Routing Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: Is `camera` explicitly set in the brief?

branch.conclusion: Reject the brief. Return error "camera required". Force the planner to choose from the closed vocabulary.

branch.question: Does the brief require subject consistency across multiple shots (subject_consistency_required == true)?

branch.conclusion: Use image-to-video. Require anchor_image_url; generate one canonical still via img-gen-basics if missing. Route to Runway image_to_video or Luma keyframes.frame0.

branch.question: What is the style_tag in the brief?

branch.conclusion: Provider = Luma Dream Machine. 5s default, 720p, REST API. Apply ffprobe validation step.
Provider = Runway Gen-3 Alpha Turbo. 5-10s, 1080p, official Python SDK. Apply ffprobe validation step.
Provider = Replicate AnimateDiff. Pin model hash in config. Cache by seed for deterministic regen.
Provider = Replicate SVD (Stable Video Diffusion). Cheapest; iterate cheap; promote to Runway/Luma for final.

example.p: Input: brief with subject="golden retriever", camera="tracking", style="cinematic", subject_consistency_required=false. → camera set → consistency false → style_tag cinematic → conclusion r3-ffprobe-validate: route to Runway Gen-3, run ffprobe after download.
